title: Dropdowns no longer hide behind the popovers that open them
summary: Changing a column's data type from the table view's ⋯ menu works again. The type dropdown was painting behind the field popover, so its options were unclickable — clicks landed on the menu underneath instead. Every portalled select, menu, popover, and tooltip now sits above the overlays it opens from.
highlights: Table view: the column data-type selector is usable again
Selects and menus opened from inside modals and popovers stay on top
